studies.title: Prosthetic Performance Enhancement Trial (PROSPER)
studies.significance: Addresses mobility and fall prevention for prosthetic users; directly relevant to access and quality-of-life outcomes

studies.title: European Prosthetic Joint Infection Cohort Study (EPJIC)
studies.significance: Large-scale international registry for prosthetic joint infection outcomes

studies.title: Patient Satisfaction and Quality of Life Among Lower Limb Prosthetic Users in Gaza
studies.significance: Context-specific QoL research; model for studying prosthetic access in underserved/conflict zones
